name: Magatch
short_description: Sultan is very fond of precious stones, he adores and collects them, but his time is limited for collecting stones, but driven by passion and greed, he will never stop
detailed_description:
Sultan is very fond of precious stones, he adores and collects them, but his time is limited for collecting stones, but driven by passion and greed, he will never stop.

Magatch is a 3-D game where the player needs to collect interconnected stones of the same color in order to accumulate a certain number of points, but with a limited number of attempts.

Control:

Left Mouse Button - Taking Stones

Game Features:

  • Visual style

  • 3 in a row

  • Complexity
